description: Map a GitHub workflow_run webhook payload to an OCI Logging logEntryBatch
expression: { "logEntryBatches": [{ "defaultlogentrytime": $now(), "entries": [{ "data": { "outcome": workflow_run.conclusion, "workflow": workflow_run.name, "run_id": $string(workflow_run.id), "run_number": $string(workflow_run.run_number), "branch": workflow_run.head_branch, "sha": workflow_run.head_sha, "repo": repository.full_name, "url": workflow_run.html_url, "event": "github_workflow_run" } }] }] }
